description_long: This is a small, single-propeller airplane with a streamlined, rounded fuselage painted in a vibrant red color. The wings are straight and extend laterally from the midsection of the fuselage, with no visible winglets or dihedral angles. The cockpit is enclosed with a blue-tinted canopy, positioned just behind the propeller and ahead of the wings, suggesting a single-seat configuration. The tail features a conventional design with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, all smoothly integrated into the rear fuselage. The propeller is mounted at the nose, and there are no visible landing gear components. The overall design is simple and stylized, with smooth surfaces and minimal detailing.
description: A small, red, single-propeller airplane with a blue-tinted enclosed cockpit and a conventional tail. The wings are straight and mid-mounted, and the design is sleek and minimal.
description_view_0: Side view showing the red fuselage, blue cockpit canopy, single propeller at the nose, and the full length of the tail and wing.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the straight wingspan, blue cockpit canopy, and the symmetrical tail structure.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, showing the propeller, cockpit, and tail from the other side.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the propeller, nose, and the width of the wings, with the cockpit canopy visible behind the propeller.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with straight wings and no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a blue-tinted canopy.
